creator: olgeni@uli.it
text:
The PLIST for this port lists some files that are not installed.

Fix: Patch:
How-To-Repeat: 
# cd /usr/ports/editors/vim5
# make install
# make deinstall

pkg_delete: file `/usr/local/share/vim/vim57/syntax/abaqus.vim' doesn't
really exist
...
pkg_delete: file `/usr/local/share/vim/vim57/syntax/wml.vim' doesn't really
exist
pkg_delete: couldn't entirely delete package (perhaps the packing list is
incorrectly specified?)
